Build Report
============

 1. Read sources
    attoplot.js  19,630 bytes
    index.html   46,972 bytes

 2. Extract class/ID names
    55 classes, 28 IDs

 3. Validate names

 4. Bundle JS (Bun transpiler)
    48,741 → 31,648 bytes (35.1% reduction)
    minifies: whitespace, identifiers, syntax

 5. Inline JS into HTML

 6. Rename classes/IDs
    55 classes + 28 IDs → 1-2 char names

 7. Minify HTML (html-minifier-terser)
    47,137 → 31,516 bytes (33.1% reduction)
    options: collapseWhitespace, removeComments,
             minifyCSS, minifyJS (terser 2-pass)

 8. Gzip
    index.html  31,516 → 10,836 bytes (level 9)

 9. Base64
    index.html.gz  10,836 → 14,448 bytes

10. Write dist/

11. Merge Shelly script
    shelly-em-script.js + base64 payload → em-dashboard.shelly.js
    script size:    14,811 bytes
    decoded binary: 10,836 bytes
    estimated RAM:  25,647 bytes (script + decoded payload)

Build complete: no warnings or errors

Output Files
============

  dist/index.html        31,516 bytes  Minified single-file app (JS+CSS inlined)
  dist/index.html.gz     10,836 bytes  Gzip-compressed index.html
  dist/index.html.gz.b64 14,448 bytes  Base64 of gzip (for firmware embedding)
  dist/em-dashboard.shelly.js 14,811 bytes  Ready-to-upload Shelly script

Size Comparison
===============

  uPlot 1.6.31 (JS + CSS, reference):
    source:   149,228 bytes
    minified:  52,169 bytes
    gzip min:  22,488 bytes

  attoplot.js (standalone):
    source:   19,630 bytes
    minified:  8,260 bytes
    gzip min:  3,376 bytes

  index.html (attoplot.js inlined):
    source:   46,972 bytes
    minified: 31,516 bytes
    gzip min: 10,836 bytes
    base64 gz: 14,448 bytes
